name: rewire-break-the-cycle-alter-your-thoughts-and-create-lasting-change
description: Nicole Vignola's Rewire — a neuroscience-based 3-phase protocol for identifying, interrupting, and rewriting subconscious thought patterns and self-limiting beliefs through neuroplasticity.
useCase: Apply the 3-phase Rewire Protocol (Ditch the Negative → Shift Your Narrative → Boost the Positive) to rewire automatic negative thoughts, build self-trust, and create lasting behavioral change through neuroscience.
knownRisks: Not a substitute for professional mental health treatment for clinical depression, anxiety disorders, or trauma
Some individuals with severe neurodivergent conditions may need professional guidance to adapt the protocol
Sleep and exercise recommendations should be adjusted for individuals with specific health conditions
